calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Developers Link, Inc. or Mikhail Bilichak.
Default entered against defendants on October 16, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 16, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Dok Su Kim, individually and dba Fulton Cleaners and Judy Kim, individually and dba Fulton Cleaners as follows:

Damages/Principal - $70,226.82.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,270.32.
Attorney's Fees -$2,500.00.
Costs - $475.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $75,472.14.

It is further Ordered and Adjudged that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment set forth in paragraph three of the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
